What We Do

Our Services

From TV mounting to heavy lifting & loading — we'll get you covered! Flat-rate & hourly options available.

📺

TV Mounting

  • Flush, Tilting & Full Motion mounts
  • Wire concealment
  • Frame TV mounting
🔧

General Mounting

  • Mirrors & curtain rods
  • Indoor/outdoor blinds & shades
  • Pictures, art & cabinets
🛋️

Furniture Assembly

  • All types of indoor furniture
  • Outdoor furniture
  • Any brand, any complexity
⚡

Electrical Help

  • Ceiling fan & light fixture install
  • Security camera install
  • Smart doorbell & smoke detectors
🚿

Plumbing Help

  • Faucet & garbage disposal install
  • Toilet & bidet installation
  • Wax rings & showerhead replace
🪣

Wall Repair

  • Hole patching & repair
  • Nail & screw hole filling
  • Surface prep & finish
🚪

Carpentry

  • Door repair & adjustment
  • Lock repair & replace
  • Hinge troubleshooting
📦

Moving Help & Heavy Lifting

  • Loading & unloading
  • Packing & unpacking
  • Space organizing
🗑️

Trash Removal

  • Furniture & appliance removal
  • Junk hauling
  • Yard waste & debris

FAQ

Questions & Answers

How much do you charge for your services? ▾
We offer both flat-rate and hourly pricing depending on the scope of the job. Contact us with your project details and we'll provide a transparent quote — no hidden fees, ever.
Do you have a license and insurance? ▾
Yes! We are fully licensed and insured so you can have complete peace of mind when we work in your home or office.
Do you work on weekends and holidays? ▾
Absolutely. We work 7 days a week, including weekends, from 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM. We're here when you need us.
What areas of San Diego do you serve? ▾
We serve all of San Diego County. If you're unsure whether we cover your area, just give us a call at (619) 657-6172 and we'll let you know!

Still have questions? Call us at (619) 657-6172 or email handyhelpers619@gmail.com
